title: Tori Kuykendall
compiled_truth: Tori Kuykendall is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-11 to 2002-01-18), Tori Kuykendall sent 506 and received 519 emails, totalling 1025 interactions. Top correspondents: [Melba Lozano](people/melba-lozano) (29), [Susan Hadix](people/susan-hadix-elpaso) (24), [Rhaygood](people/rhaygood-darbylaw) (22), [Pkuykendall](people/pkuykendall-wm) (22), [Mike Grigsby](people/mike-grigsby) (21). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, deleted_items, private_folders, sent, sent_items.
